name: Upgrade Start/Stop
description: Stops the LXC container, backs up its config, destroys and recreates it with the new OCI image at the same VMID, merges all config back from backup, then starts the container. Falls back to restoring the backup on failure.

parameters.name: VM ID
parameters.description: LXC container ID to upgrade in-place.

parameters.name: Template Path
parameters.description: Path to the downloaded OCI template (from 011-get-oci-image.json).

parameters.name: OS Type
parameters.description: Optional OS type for the container.

parameters.name: OCI Image
parameters.description: OCI image reference used for notes/markers.

parameters.name: Application ID
parameters.description: Optional application ID used in notes/markers.

parameters.name: Application Name
parameters.description: Optional application name used in notes/markers.
